betterchatheads.config.title: Better Chat Heads
betterchatheads.config.subtitle: Live settings for chat heads, tab heads, and update prompts.
betterchatheads.config.hint: Changes apply as soon as you save. Mod Menu support stays optional.
betterchatheads.config.enable_chat_heads: Render heads beside player-linked chat lines.
Render or preserve heads in the player list.
betterchatheads.config.render_overlay_la: Draw hat and hair pixels over the base face layer.
Adds a subtle scaled outer layer so chat heads feel more 3D without shifting layout.
betterchatheads.config.use_default_fallb: Use a Steve or Alex style fallback when no usable skin is available.
betterchatheads.config.show_own_chat_hea: Show a head for your own sent chat messages.
betterchatheads.config.show_chat_indicat: Draw a subtle prefix marker next to player chat lines.
betterchatheads.config.show_chat_backgro: Reserved for future background controls. Player chat uses vanilla handling.
betterchatheads.config.show_keybind_feed: Show action bar messages when a Better Chat Heads keybind changes a setting.
betterchatheads.config.enable_update_che: Check for a newer published version in the background.
betterchatheads.config.allow_update_prom: Allow the update popup to appear while you are in a world instead of waiting for a menu screen.
betterchatheads.config.head_size.tooltip: Scale used for both chat and tab heads.
betterchatheads.config.chat_head_padding: Spacing between the chat head and chat text.
Reserved spacing for tab head layouts and future custom tab rendering.
betterchatheads.config.chat_vertical_off: Fine tune head alignment against the chat line baseline.
betterchatheads.config.chat_animation_ti: How many ticks a new chat line eases in when it first appears.
betterchatheads.feedback.chat_heads_on: Better Chat Heads: chat heads enabled
betterchatheads.feedback.chat_heads_off: Better Chat Heads: chat heads disabled
betterchatheads.feedback.tab_heads_on: Better Chat Heads: tab heads enabled
betterchatheads.feedback.tab_heads_off: Better Chat Heads: tab heads disabled
betterchatheads.feedback.overlay_on: Better Chat Heads: overlay layer enabled
betterchatheads.feedback.overlay_off: Better Chat Heads: overlay layer disabled
betterchatheads.update.title: Better Chat Heads %s is available
